headline: What Analyst Projections for Key Metrics Reveal About O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Q1 Earnings
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended March 2026.
